title: [InstCombine] Fix incorect `foldPowiReassoc` on signed overflow
author: el-ev

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double, i32) #0

declare void @use(double)

define double @powi_fmul_powi_use_second(double %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
entry:
  %p1 = tail call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 %z)
  tail call void @use(double %p1)
  %p2 = tail call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 %y)
  %mul = fmul reassoc double %p2, %p1
  ret double %mul
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

; Function Attrs: nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double, i32) #0

declare void @use(double)

define double @powi_fmul_powi_use_first(double %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
entry:
  %p1 = tail call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 %y)
  tail call void @use(double %p1)
  %p2 = tail call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 %z)
  %mul = fmul reassoc double %p1, %p2
  ret double %mul
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

comments.author: llvmorg-github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!--LLVM PR SUMMARY COMMENT-->

@llvm/pr-subscribers-llvm-transforms

Author: Iris Shi (el-ev)

<details>
<summary>Changes</summary>

Reproducer: 

```
#include <math.h>                                                                                                                     
#include <stdio.h>

__attribute__((noinline))
double f(double x) {
    return __builtin_powi(x, 1073741824) * __builtin_powi(x, 1073741824);
}

int main(void) {
    double r = f(2.0);
    printf("%f\n", r);
    return r == 0.0; // 0 = correct, 1 = miscompile
}
```

https://llvm.godbolt.org/z/sjK1EsGhx

---
Full diff: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/197172.diff


3 Files Affected:

- (modified) llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp (+12-4) 
- (added) llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/powi-mul-overflow.ll (+45) 
- (modified) llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/powi.ll (+5-5) 


``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp
index 384f38b2c5362..fc74b1a68ce4c 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp
@@ -633,9 +633,17 @@ Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::foldFPSignBitOps(BinaryOperator &I) {
 
 Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::foldPowiReassoc(BinaryOperator &I) {
   auto createPowiExpr = [](BinaryOperator &I, InstCombinerImpl &IC, Value *X,
-                           Value *Y, Value *Z) {
+                           Value *Y, Value *Z) -> Instruction * {
+    auto *CY = dyn_cast<ConstantInt>(Y);
+    auto *CZ = dyn_cast<ConstantInt>(Z);
+    if (CY && CZ) {
+      bool Overflow;
+      (void)CY->getValue().sadd_ov(CZ->getValue(), Overflow);
+      if (Overflow)
+        return nullptr;
+    }
     InstCombiner::BuilderTy &Builder = IC.Builder;
-    Value *YZ = Builder.CreateAdd(Y, Z);
+    Value *YZ = Builder.CreateNSWAdd(Y, Z);
     Instruction *NewPow = Builder.CreateIntrinsic(
         Intrinsic::powi, {X->getType(), YZ->getType()}, {X, YZ}, &I);
 
@@ -668,8 +676,8 @@ Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::foldPowiReassoc(BinaryOperator &I) {
       match(Op1, m_AllowReassoc(m_Intrinsic<Intrinsic::powi>(m_Specific(X),
                                                              m_Value(Z)))) &&
       Y->getType() == Z->getType()) {
-    Instruction *NewPow = createPowiExpr(I, *this, X, Y, Z);
-    return replaceInstUsesWith(I, NewPow);
+    if (Instruction *NewPow = createPowiExpr(I, *this, X, Y, Z))
+      return replaceInstUsesWith(I, NewPow);
   }
 
   if (Opcode == Instruction::FDiv && I.hasAllowReassoc() && I.hasNoNaNs()) {
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/powi-mul-overflow.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/powi-mul-overflow.ll
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..1201b7e15a897
--- /dev/null
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/powi-mul-overflow.ll
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py UTC_ARGS: --version 5
+; RUN: opt -passes=instcombine -S < %s | FileCheck %s
+
+; The two case below should not fold because they overflow
+
+define double @powi_mul_overflow(double %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define double @powi_mul_overflow(
+; CHECK-SAME: double [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P1:%.*]] = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X]], i32 2147483640)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P2:%.*]] = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X]], i32 100)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = fmul reassoc double [[P1]], [[P2]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret double [[R]]
+;
+  %p1 = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 2147483640)
+  %p2 = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 100)
+  %r = fmul reassoc double %p1, %p2
+  ret double %r
+}
+
+define double @powi_mul_overflow_neg(double %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define double @powi_mul_overflow_neg(
+; CHECK-SAME: double [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P1:%.*]] = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X]], i32 -2147483640)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P2:%.*]] = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X]], i32 -100)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = fmul reassoc double [[P1]], [[P2]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret double [[R]]
+;
+  %p1 = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 -2147483640)
+  %p2 = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 -100)
+  %r = fmul reassoc double %p1, %p2
+  ret double %r
+}
+
+; This one should fold
+define double @powi_mul_no_overflow(double %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define double @powi_mul_no_overflow(
+; CHECK-SAME: double [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X]], i32 3000)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret double [[R]]
+;
+  %p1 = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 1000)
+  %p2 = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %x, i32 2000)
+  %r = fmul reassoc double %p1, %p2
+  ret double %r
+}
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/powi.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/powi.ll
index c341318f86dae..f708cdfc742b7 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/powi.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/powi.ll
@@ -177,7 +177,7 @@ entry:
 define double @powi_fmul_powi(double %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @powi_fmul_powi(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = add i32 [[Z:%.*]], [[Y:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = add nsw i32 [[Z:%.*]], [[Y:%.*]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL:%.*]] = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X:%.*]], i32 [[TMP0]])
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret double [[MUL]]
 ;
@@ -191,7 +191,7 @@ entry:
 define double @powi_fmul_powi_fast_on_fmul(double %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @powi_fmul_powi_fast_on_fmul(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = add i32 [[Z:%.*]], [[Y:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = add nsw i32 [[Z:%.*]], [[Y:%.*]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL:%.*]] = call fast double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X:%.*]], i32 [[TMP0]])
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret double [[MUL]]
 ;
@@ -220,7 +220,7 @@ entry:
 define double @powi_fmul_powi_same_power(double %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @powi_fmul_powi_same_power(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = shl i32 [[Y:%.*]], 1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = shl nsw i32 [[Y:%.*]], 1
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL:%.*]] = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X:%.*]], i32 [[TMP0]])
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret double [[MUL]]
 ;
@@ -251,7 +251,7 @@ define double @powi_fmul_powi_use_first(double %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P1:%.*]] = tail call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X:%.*]], i32 [[Y:%.*]])
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    tail call void @use(double [[P1]])
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = add i32 [[Y]], [[Z:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = add nsw i32 [[Y]], [[Z:%.*]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL:%.*]] = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X]], i32 [[TMP0]])
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret double [[MUL]]
 ;
@@ -268,7 +268,7 @@ define double @powi_fmul_powi_use_second(double %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P1:%.*]] = tail call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X:%.*]], i32 [[Z:%.*]])
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    tail call void @use(double [[P1]])
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = add i32 [[Y:%.*]], [[Z]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = add nsw i32 [[Y:%.*]], [[Z]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL:%.*]] = call reassoc double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double [[X]], i32 [[TMP0]])
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret double [[MUL]]
 ;

``````````

</details>
